<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send Data using Network"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/integration/network/data"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send data to TagoIO using the Network instead.

This endpoint allows the [Network Payload Parser](/docs/tagoio/devices/payload-parser/) to identify and redirect data to the correct device created using the Network associated with the Network Token and [Authorization Token](/docs/tagoio/integrations/general/authorization/).

The Network's Payload Parser is required to set the serial within the network parser. For example:

``` javascript
 if (Array.isArray(payload)) {
   const payload_received = payload.find(x => x.variable === "payload");
   serial = payload_received?.metadata?.serial;
 }

 ```

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
